overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom showing Link exploring the Depths, a dark underground biome with bioluminescent vegetation. The character walks through an open field of glowing plants before entering a cavern with tall rock formations and discovering a supply camp with a hot air balloon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underground field with bioluminescent flora

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the glowing underground field toward distant rock formations on the horizon

entered.detail: expansive ground cover of glowing blue and purple plants emitting soft light
dark sky visible overhead with scattered stars and faint nebula clouds
dark silhouetted rock formations marking the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast underground field illuminated by bioluminescent vegetation in shades of blue and purple. Link walks forward through the glowing grass under a starry sky, approaching distant rock formations on the horizon. The environment is serene and empty, with dense glowing flora covering the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground cavern with twisted rock pillars and supply camp

events.description: character enters a more enclosed cavern area with tall twisted rock formations and bioluminescent trees

agents.ego_description: approaching a supply camp with a large hot air balloon structure tethered to crates

entered.detail: large spiraling stalagmite-like formations rising from the cavern floor
tall thin trees with glowing blue tips and twisted branches
large spherical balloon tethered to wooden supply crates with metal chains
burning campfire providing warm orange light near the supply crates

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large underground cavern with towering twisted rock pillars and bioluminescent trees. The open sky is replaced by a dark cave ceiling. Link approaches a supply camp featuring a large hot air balloon tethered to crates, with a campfire burning nearby. The environment shifts from open field to enclosed fungal forest with distinct vertical rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast bioluminescent wasteland that gradually transitions into a sheltered underground cavern. It begins with Link walking across an open field of glowing blue and purple vegetation under a starry sky, moving steadily toward distant rock formations on the horizon. As the character advances, the open expanse shifts into an enclosed fungal forest where the sky is replaced by a dark cave ceiling and towering twisted rock pillars. The scene then opens up to reveal a supply camp, with the camera gliding past burning campfires and crates toward a large tethered hot air balloon.
